languages.text: "Я прикажу своим людям забрать его на флагман. Хочу изучить его".
"I shall have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."
languages.original_text: "Я прикажу своим людям забрать его на флагман. Хочу изучить его".

traits.locale_text: "I'll have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."
"I'll have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."
"I shall have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."
"I shall have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."

languages.text: “我会让我的人把它运回旗舰。我想好好检查一下。”
languages.original_text: "I shall have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."

traits.locale_text: “我会让我的人把它运回旗舰。我想好好检查一下。”

languages.text: "Adamlarıma onu sancak gemisine taşımalarını emredeceğim. İncelemek istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I shall have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."

traits.locale_text: "Adamlarıma onu sancak gemisine taşımalarını emredeceğim. İncelemek istiyorum."

languages.text: « Mes serviteurs l'emmèneront à bord de mon vaisseau amiral. Je souhaite l'examiner. »
languages.original_text: "I shall have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."

traits.locale_text: « Mes serviteurs l'emmèneront à bord de mon vaisseau amiral. Je souhaite l'examiner. »

languages.text: «Haré que mi gente lo transporte a la nave insignia. Quiero examinarlo».
languages.original_text: "I shall have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."

traits.locale_text: «Haré que mi gente lo transporte a la nave insignia. Quiero examinarlo».

languages.text: "Meine Leute werden sie auf das Flaggschiff bringen. Ich möchte sie untersuchen."
languages.original_text: "I shall have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."

traits.locale_text: "Meine Leute werden sie auf das Flaggschiff bringen. Ich möchte sie untersuchen."

languages.text: 「この船を旗艦に運んでもらおう。私はこれを調べたい。」
languages.original_text: "I shall have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."

traits.locale_text: 「この船を旗艦に運んでもらおう。私はこれを調べたい。」
